summary: Root Bubble Tea model implementing Init/Update/View with dual-view support (dashboard+channels), command handlers for refresh/summarize/add-source, and auto-refresh scheduling
side_effects: Manages RefreshService and SummarizeService dependency injection
config_deps: spinnerStyle, loadingStyle, errorStyle, activeTabStyle, inactiveTabStyle, helpDescStyle, statusBarStyle (from styles.go)
notes: Central Bubbletea model as described in hints. 18 functions total: constructor, Init/Update/View, handleKeyMsg, renderTabBar/renderStatusBar, 7 data-loading commands (loadSummaries, loadChannels, deleteChannel, refresh, summarize, refreshFiltered, summarizeFiltered, addSource, scheduleAutoRefresh). Routes messages to child models (dashboard, channels, help). Uses option pattern for dependency injection (WithRefresh, WithSummarize).
